title: Repurposed Structures - Apocalyptic Fortress Compat
description: Add a menacingly looking Jungle Fortress into the world based on Apocalyptic Fortress mod!
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between Repurposed Structures and Apocalyptic Fortress mod. The original RS Jungle Fortress will be disabled and an Apocalyptic Fortress styled Jungle Fortress will be added instead. This datapack will work with other RS Compatibility datapacks that also affect the Jungle Fortress. Each new Fortress style is a new structure.


- Apocalyptic Fortress mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/apocalyptic-fortress

- Repurposed Structures mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-forge


![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5yebye0l/images/3e5f28f655962df2707c0906f61caa732af3bda6.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5yebye0l/images/3e5f28f655962df2707c0906f61caa732af3bda6.png)


**Note:** for people using CurseForge Launcher to download datapacks, use mods like Global Data & Resourcespacks to automatically load in downloaded datapacks without needing to manually move the datapacks from the resourcepack folder to the correct folders. 
https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks
